LanguageData.ARA_MimicNematodeShambler.description: The Arachnid Nematode Shambler is one of the most mysterious branches in the insectoid community. It shares a common ancestry with the original parasites, but instead of evolving into higher intelligence, it took a different evolutionary path: parasitism. The Nematode Shambler cannot survive independently and must live within its host. Once inside a host body, they gradually take over the host's nervous system and metabolic processes, transforming them into mindless "
LanguageData.ARA_MimicNematodeShambler.label: Mimic Nematode Shambler
LanguageData.ARA_MimicNematodeShambler.tools.0.label: Rip and tear
LanguageData.ARA_MimicNematodeShambler.tools.1.label: Giant Scythe
LanguageData.ARA_MimicNematodeShambler.tools.2.label: Giant Scythe
